name: Process Improvement
description: Improves processes by identifying friction, redesigning flow, and defining measurable changes that increase speed, quality, or reliability.

variables.name: process
variables.description: The process or workflow to improve

variables.name: current_pain_points
variables.description: Known pain points or inefficiencies in the current process

variables.name: performance_data
variables.description: Current cycle time, error rates, throughput data

variables.name: improvement_goal
variables.description: Target improvement: cycle time reduction, cost savings, quality improvement

inputs.name: process
inputs.description: The process or workflow to improve

inputs.name: current_pain_points
inputs.description: Known pain points or inefficiencies in the current process

inputs.name: performance_data
inputs.description: Current cycle time, error rates, throughput data

inputs.name: improvement_goal
inputs.description: Target improvement: cycle time reduction, cost savings, quality improvement
